entry.condition: Buy signal or sell signal fires from the TDI sharkfin logic.
entry.default_threshold: White label up for long, white label down for short

confirmation.condition: Fast TDI momentum must be outside the 32/68 band and reversing back from an extreme.

take_profit.condition: Exit when price reaches the configured take-profit percentage from entry.

stop_loss.condition: Exit when price reaches the configured stop-loss percentage from entry.
